faqs.question: Which Medical fields offer the best work-life balance?
faqs.answer:
Some medical field which offe best work and life balance are shown below -
Dentistry (BDS & MDS) – Fixed clinic hours, fewer emergencies.
Pharmacy (BPharm & MPharm) – Less stress compared to hospital-based jobs.
Physiotherapy (BPT & MPT) – Flexible working hours, minimal emergency calls.
Public Health & Community Medicine – Focus on preventive healthcare rather than emergency treatments.
Clinical Research & Medical Writing – Research-based work with no direct patient responsibilities.

college_info.intro:
Chitkara University popular programmes are MBA, BTech, BSc & MSc. Chitkara University students MBA students apply marketing principles to real-life situations through case studies and projects. Chitkara University Rajpura MBA students can become Managers, Team Leaders, Brand Manager, Customer Relationship Manager, and others. Chitkara University Punjab provides accelerated career growth in Marketing careers. MSc students are given internship opportunities and also provided campus recruitment opportunities.
Chitkara University Rajpura follows a module-based teaching structure in which each and every module includes 2 subjects, with credits ranging from 2 to 3. The curriculum of the provided courses are well-designed. The university believes in providing good learning opportunities to students. One of the popular BTech specialisations include B.E. CSE Programme with specialisation in AI & ML in collaboration with Microsoft. The below is the B.E. CSE programme structure:

The highest package offered to the BTech students during Chitkara University placements in 2023 was INR 1.11 crore per annum. reviews_list.review_title: Best infrastructure and facilities.

review_content.Placements: Overall, students were placed who have skills and industry-based knowledge. The highest package was 12 LPA and the average was 6 LPA. Top companies like KPMG, EY, and PwC offered top roles such as senior manager and accounts manager. Almost all students got internships through college referrals.
review_content.Infrastructure: Luxury rooms were available; 1, 2, 3, and 4-seater rooms with CCTV footage. Wi-Fi was also provided with speeds up to 40 Mbps. Mess food is disappointing. Sports activities and a gym are also provided. Medical facilities are available 24/7, and there is a hospital at the main gate.

overview_faqs.question: What are the fee refund rules of Chitkara University?
overview_faqs.answer: In Chitkara University, fees once paid will be fully refunded, with a deduction of INR 1,000 for processing charges if a withdrawal request is made before the session starts. In case a withdrawal application is made after the commencement of classes, fees will be refunded after a deduction along with a deduction of INR 1000 towards processing charges. The fee shall be refunded within 90 days of the start of the academic session if the refund application is submitted before the start of the session.

review_summary.college_name: Chitkara University Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Computer Science & Engineering with Specialisations - Batch of 2029
individual_reviews.title: Chitkara University: The Place to Explore Your Potential.

content.Placements: Placements at Chitkara University are excellent and well-structured. For my batch/course, around 80-90% of eligible students were placed, with many receiving multiple offers. Top companies like Amazon, Deloitte, TCS, Wipro, Infosys, etc., come.
content.Infrastructure: Perfect facilities and infrastructure; everything is up to date and all classes have Wi-Fi. Classrooms are air-conditioned, the library is great and has a separate Wi-Fi, sports, games, and every facility is fantastic. Lovely atmosphere, love this college.

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Electronics and Communication Engineering - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: Decent in every field, do check it out.

content.Placements: So, talking about the placements, about 1/3rd of the students are placed in the placement session. The companies that came for this include Uno Mind, HCL, and Infosys. Some private limited companies are also included in it. The average package that is offered is 5 LPA for different roles.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure here at the university is well-equipped, and the campus is Wi-Fi enabled, but you have to authenticate it with the credentials provided by the university to connect to the Wi-Fi. The university has a central library as well, where students can do self-study. The hostel provides decent facilities, and food at the mess is average to good. The medical facility of the dispensary is also provided here.

individual_reviews.course: B.Com. with ACCA - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: Best infrastructure and facilities.

content.Placements: Overall, students were placed who have skills and industry-based knowledge. The highest package was 12 LPA and the average was 6 LPA. Top companies like KPMG, EY, and PwC offered top roles such as senior manager and accounts manager. Almost all students got internships through college referrals.
content.Infrastructure: Luxury rooms were available; 1, 2, 3, and 4-seater rooms with CCTV footage. Wi-Fi was also provided with speeds up to 40 Mbps. Mess food is disappointing. Sports activities and a gym are also provided. Medical facilities are available 24/7, and there is a hospital at the main gate.

individual_reviews.course: BBA in Business Analytics - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: Absolutely satisfied with the hostel, campus and faculty members.

content.Placements: ? 90%? The highest was of 18 Lacs the lowest of 4-5 Lacs? Tcs, hcl microsoft? 95%? Analyst, manager Chitkara? S BBA programme is known for strong industry connections so students get opportunities across business, finance, marketing, operations, HR and analytics.
content.Infrastructure: Infrastructure of the whole university is fabulous. Hostel food is also good they provide and maintain cleanliness. It is also widely appreciated for its modern and well planned infrastructure. SMART classrooms, well stocked libraries, advanced laboratories and innovation and research centres that help student work in competitions. It actually offers a well rounded environment.

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Software Engineering with Deakin University - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: Really good facilities for the students in the classrooms as well in the hostels.

content.Placements: A good percentage of students were placed in my course, and the average package is around 8-9 Lacs. Top roles like data scientist and software engineer are offered. Companies like Service now, appreciate, uno mind, etc. Visit our campus every year, and many students get internships and jobs in these companies.
content.Infrastructure: Every facility for the students is well provided and well maintained in hostels as well as classrooms, a decent quality of food is available in the hostel mess, and a good food court is also available. There are 2 libraries one for the whole college and one specifically for the global students.

paragraphs: Chitkara University, Chandigarh'sadmission process is open for all courses. The university contains various steps, including filling out the application form and qualifying for the selection rounds. Check below the detailed steps of Chitkara University, Chandigarh, admission 2025:
1- Application Process 2025

Candidates must apply and appear for entrance exams accepted by the university for admission. Further, candidates must fill out the application form online and offline by visiting the campus physically.
2- Selection Round

Chitkara University, Chandigarhselects candidates for all courses based on various entrance exams such as JEE Main, SLAT, PTE and others. The college also conducts PI and GD rounds for admission to some UG and PG courses including MBA, BCA, BBA and others.
3- Allocation of Seats

The seats in the various programmes will be allotted based on merit- ranking of the student in the specified entrance test subject to fulfilling the minimum eligibility criteria for the programme and the preferences indicated in the counselling form at the time of counselling (as per availability of seats).
4- Payment and confirmation of seats

Those who are offered admission are required to pay the fees. Any kind of cheque shall NOT be accepted. All enrolled students have to pay their fees twice a year in the months notified by the university. Delayed payment of fees will attract a fine as per the rules and regulations of the University.
For more information about Chitkara University, Chandigarh Admission Process check out the below video:

faqs.question: What is the eligibility for B.Tech admission at Chitkara University?
faqs.answer: Chitkara University offers 11 full-time BTech programmes in the stream of Business and Management Studies, Engineering and IT & Software. It is a UG-level course and the selection criteria is the JEE Main entrance score. The eligibility criteria for the course is Class 12 with 60% aggregate. The duration ofChitkara University BTechis four years and the lateral entry duration is three years. A total of ten BTech courses are offered by CIET and four BTech Lateral Entry courses are offered by CCAE.

faqs.question: How can I get admission in Chitkara University for BTech?
faqs.answer: To get BTech admission at Chitkara University, the candidate need to meet the minimum educational qualification as per course requirement. The candidate should pass Class 12 with 60% aggregate or secure 60% in Physics, Chemistry, Mathematics. The selection criteria for the course isJEE Mains score. Overall, BTech is a four-year programme at Chitkara University.

faqs.question: How many marks are necessary for B.Tech at Chitkara College of Applied Engineering, Chandigarh?
faqs.answer: Chitkara University does not provide any additional entrance examination for admission. There are two main criterias for B.Tech. First of all, the candidates must pass their 10+2 with a minimum of 60% marks of the total marks (mandatory subjects are Physics, Chemistry, and Mathematics) in any stream. And secondly, candidates are required to appear in national-lavel entrance examination, for example JEE Main (mandatory for 2023 batch).

courses_data.description: Chitkara University offersfull-time BCA and BCA-MCA Integrated programmes. The BCA degree is a three-year course and the candidate has to passClass 12with a50%aggregate. Here, students need to go through the final semester of the programme devoted to a project which can be carried out in the software industry or in the University itself. Furthermore, It is five- years including three years of intensive learning experience at the Chitkara University campus with plenty of theoretical knowledge followed by two years of internship in a reputed IT organisation. However, after the completion of a three-year BCA coupled with intensive classes, students get to spend the last two years as an internship in IT companies. For more details onChitkara University admissionof the BBA programme, i.e.,common eligibilityandselection criteriastudents can check the table presented below: Course Common Eligibility Selection Criteria BCA Class 12 in any stream with a minimum 50% aggregate Merit-Based + PI BCA-MCA Integrated Class 12 in any stream with a minimum 50% aggregate Merit-Based + PI

faqs.question: How can I get admission in Chitkara University Chandigarh?
faqs.answer: In order to get admission at Chitkara University Chandigarh, students need to meet the last educational qualifications. The candidate need to complete Class 12 with 50% to 65% aggregate. The selection criteria for the course is Merit-Based. At, if a candidate haveTOEFL(Test of English as a Foreign Language) – score of at least 570 (or 230 if computer-based score), plus a minimum TWE (essay) score of 4.0, or IBT score of 88 with no section below 20 is eleigible for BBA programme.

faqs.question: Are admissions at Chitkara University, Chandigarh entrance-based or merit-based?
faqs.answer: Chitkara University in Chandigarhadmits students based on both merit and entrance. The university accepts national-level entrance exams like: MAT, XAT, CAT, JEE Main.Admissions depend on the following criteria:Merit in the entrance testMarks in the qualifying examinationMeeting the minimum eligibility requirementsThe university also accepts Pearson Test Scores and SAT Scores for admission.The counseling process helps students find the programme of their choice. Students must appear in person before the counseling committee on the specified date and time. Failure to do so will result in rejection of the application.

faqs.question: Can I take admission in Chitkara University Chandigarh without JEE Main for Engineering courses?
faqs.answer: Chitkara University offers 11 full-time BTech programmes in the stream of Business and Management Studies,  Engineering and IT & Software. It is a UG-level course and the selection criteria is the JEE Main entrance score. The eligibility criteria for the course is Class 12 with 60% aggregate. The duration of Chitkara University BTech is four years and the lateral entry duration is three years.

faqs.question: What is the cutoff of Chitkara University?

faqs.question: What is the reality of Chitkara University placements?
faqs.answer: Chitkara University offers a decent placement rate, with students from almost all the courses getting placement assistance. During Chitkara University placements 2023, over 1,150 BTech students were placed during Chitkara University placements. The institute attracted more than 670 industry giants who offered a variety of job roles to the Engineering students across sectors, such as Assurance, IT, Education, Operations, Sales and Marketing, etc. Further, the highest and average package offered during Chitkara University MBA placements in 2023 was INR 44 LPA and INR 9 LPA, respectively. The key highlights of Chitkara University placements for the BTech and MBA Class of 2023 are tabulated below: Particulars BTech Placement Statistics (2023) MBA Placement Statistics (2023) Highest package INR 111 LPA INR 44 LPA Average Package NA INR 9 LPA Median package NA INR 10.5 LPA Total students 1,800 NA Total students placed 1,150+ NA Total recruiters 670+ 275+ Dream offers 570+ 140+ Super Dream offers 310+ NA PPOs NA 175+ International offers NA 35+

faqs.question: Does Chitkara University offer placements abroad?
faqs.answer: Yes, Chitkara University offers placements both internationally and nationally. The top companies who visit the campus are Amazon, Adobe, Deloitte, EY, KPMG, etc. Students get an opportunity to work in areas of IT, Education, Consulting, E-Commerce, etc. In 2023 placement drive, the highest package given among BTech students was INR 1.11 Crore per annum. For the MBA students, the highest package was INR 44 LPA and INR 9 LPA was the average package.

faqs.question: Is Chitkara University, Chandigarh hard to get?
faqs.answer: Chitkara University offers a wide range of courses at the UG, PG and PhD level. To get admission here, candidates must meet the eligibility criteria set by the university as per respective courses. The selection criteria also differ as per respective courses. Students can check the selection criteria for some of the top courses of the university below: Course Name Selection Criteria BE JEE Main BA LLB (Hons) Merit-Based BBA Merit-Based + PI BCA Merit-Based + PI MCA MAT, XAT, CAT, NMAT, CMAT, JEE Main, SAT India or Chitkara University Test + GD + PI* * The candidate who does not have CAT/MAT/NMAT/XAT/CMAT exam score needs to sit for the Chitkara University Test + GD + PI.

faqs.question: What is the BBA package in Chitkara University?
faqs.answer: Chitkara Business School is a part of Chitakara University. The college has not released the placement data for BBA for the year 2023. However, as per Shiksha review, 80% BBA in Business Analytics students were placed during the recent placement drive. The table below showcases a few placement data that took place for BBA in Business Analytics during the recent placement drive: Particulars Statistics the highest package INR 21 LPA Average package INR 7 LPA to INR 8 LPA Placement rate 80% Top Recruiters EY, McKinsey & Company NOTE: This is to note that the placement data mentioned above for BBA in Business Analytics is gathered from Shiksha review page. Hence, the stats may vary further.

faqs.question: How are the MBA placements at Chitkara University?
faqs.answer: Chitkara University has a great track record of MBA placements. According to the latest report, the highest and average package offered during Chitkara University MBA placements in 2023 was INR 44 LPA and INR 9 LPA, respectively. The key highlights of Chitkara University MBA placements for the Class of 2023 are tabulated below: Particulars MBA Placement Statistics (2023) Highest package INR 44 LPA Average Package INR 9 LPA Median package INR 10.5 LPA Total recruiters 275+ Dream offers 140+ PPOs 175+ International offers 35+

faqs.question: What is the tuition fee for MBA course at Chitkara University?
faqs.answer: Chitkara University MBA tuition fee is 3.3 Lacs - INR 9 L . After last selection, students need to pay admission fee amount to confirm seats. It should be noted that the mentioned fee is according to the official website/ sanctioning body. It can be revised and hence, is indicative.

faqs.question: What is the fee of B.Com course at Chitkara Business School?
faqs.answer: The overall fees of an BCom in Chitkara Business School irange from INR 3.6 lakh to INR 3.8 lakh , tuition fees for three years. The BCom fees might includes other include components other than tuition fees, such as one-time fee of INR 20,000 , which candidates must pay only at the time admission. faqs.question: What is the total tuition fee for MBA/PGDM at Chitkara Business School Chandigarh?
faqs.answer: The total tuition fee for the MBA course at Chitkara Business School ranges from INR 6.60 Lacs to INR 10.20 lakh . The 2 year full-time MBA course is offered in 9 specialisations, namely Marketing, Finance, Logistics & Supply Chain, Business Analytics, Human Resource Management, HealthCare, Retail Management, Pharmaceutical Management, and Banking, Financial Services and Insurance. Candidates need to take a national level entrance exam, such as CAT, XAT, MAT, CMAT or NMAT to take admission.

faqs: What is the cutoff of Chitkara University?
description: Chitkara University cutoff 2025 is available on this page for admission to the B.Sc in Hospitality Administration course. The universi accepts the NCHMCT JEE entrance exam for selecting students. Candidates seeking admission can scroll down to check the year and round-wise cutoff trends. A few more updates are below:

Chitkara University NCHMCT JEE cutoff 2025 for admission to the BSc in Hospitality Management course was 4062 in the last round, for the students belonging to the General AI quota. The first round closing rank for the same course was 6366. Check out the table below:

Chitkara University cutoff 2025 has been released for NCHMCT JEE across different rounds and categories. For the General AI category, the last round cutoff rank for the B.Sc. in Hospitality Administration course was 4062. In 2024, the cutoff rank for the same course was 987, while in 2023, it was 9338. So, comparing the cutoff data for admission to the BSc course, Chitkara University saw a fluctuating trend over three years.

Candidates planning to appear for next year's exam must go through the NCHMCT JEE cutoff marks of the latest and previous years to get an idea of admission chances at Chitkara University. Students can view or download the round and year-wise cutoff PDF lists to understand the past years' cutoff trends for B.Sc in Hospitality Administration admission.

highlights.description:
Chitkara University is one of India’s top institutes. Eminent national & international ranking bodies have acknowledged it as a leading institute. As per NIRF 2025, the ranking of the institute is #78 in the University category, #89 under Engineering, #78 under Management, #16 under Pharmacy, and #38 under Architecture & Planning. Talking about the international rankings, the QS World Rankings 2025 has awarded rank #1201-1400 to Chitkara University. The institute is ranked as one of the best institutes for its top class faculty. The article mentioned in this space covers all the details you need if you are interested in Chitkara University rankings.

nirf.description:
As per the overall score, Chitkara University has been placed at a good position by the NIRF under the 'Overall' category, reflecting its exceptional performance in areas like Teaching, Research, Graduation Outcomes, and creating an inclusive, quality learning environment. It is observable that in the 'Overall' category, the institute's ranks have shown stability in trend when evaluated against the ranking of the past year. In 2025, Chitkara University's rank is #101, the same as last year's rank in the 'Overall' category by the NIRF ranking.
One can observe that within the category of 'University', the institute's ranking has scaled up when compared with the previous year's ranking. In 2025, Chitkara University climbed 12 ranks to #78 rank in the 'University' category by the NIRF ranking. This is the second consecutive year that the institute has ascended in the rankings.
The institute has displayed a fluctuating trend in the 'Engineering' category as compared to the ranking of preceding years. In 2025, Chitkara University climbed 5 ranks to #89 rank in the 'Engineering' category by the NIRF ranking.
The institute's ranks in the 'Management' category; have shown a fluctuation when evaluated against previous year's ranking. In 2025, Chitkara University fell 24 ranks to #78 rank in the 'Management' category by the NIRF ranking.
Check out the latest rankings for other ranking bodies and their categories below.
Read less

outlook.description:
Based on the rankings from Outlook, Chitkara University outperformed numerous other institutes, securing a higher position, indicating that the institute is considered to be doing better in various factors evaluated by the Outlook ranking system. In the 'State Private University' category, the institute's ranks have descended when compared with the previous year's ranking. In 2025, Chitkara University fell 1 rank to #4 rank in the 'State Private University' category by the Outlook ranking.
Discover the latest rankings and categories provided by other ranking bodies listed below.

qs_world.description:
Chitkara University has received strong ranks by the QS World University Rankings under the 'Top Global Universities' category. Provided parameters including, Teaching, Graduation Outcome, Inclusivity and Research, the institute is ranked in a good position as compared to other institutes by the QS World University Rankings 2026. In the 'Top Global Universities' category, the institute's ranks have shown stability when compared with the previous year's ranking. In 2026, Chitkara University's rank is #1201, the same as last year's rank in the 'Top Global Universities' category by the QS World University Rankings.
One can observe that within the category of 'Asia', the institute's ranking has scaled up when compared with the previous year's ranking. In 2026, Chitkara University climbed 74 ranks to #325 rank in the 'Asia' category by the QS World University Rankings. This is the second consecutive year that the institute has ascended in the rankings.
It is to be noticed that the institute has shown an increasing trend in the 'Southern Asia' category as compared to the ranking of preceding years. In 2026, Chitkara University climbed 30 ranks to #75 rank in the 'Southern Asia' category by the QS World University Rankings. This is the second consecutive year that the institute has ascended in the rankings.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2029Offered by Chitkara University Institute of Engineering and Technology, Chitkara University, ChandigarhReviewed on 15 Dec 2025)
reviews.review_heading: Chitkara University: The Place to Explore Your Potential.
reviews.review_text: Perfect facilities and infrastructure; everything is up to date and all classes have Wi-Fi. Classrooms are air-conditioned, the library is great and has a separate Wi-Fi, sports, games, and every facility is fantastic. Lovely atmosphere, love this college.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2028Offered by Chitkara University Institute of Engineering and Technology, Chitkara University, ChandigarhReviewed on 11 Dec 2025)
reviews.review_heading: Decent in every field, do check it out.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure here at the university is well-equipped, and the campus is Wi-Fi enabled, but you have to authenticate it with the credentials provided by the university to connect to the Wi-Fi. The university has a central library as well, where students can do self-study. The hostel provides decent facilities, and food at the mess is average to good. The medical facility of the dispensary is also provided here.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2027Offered by Chitkara Business School, Chitkara University, ChandigarhReviewed on 9 Dec 2025)
reviews.review_heading: Best infrastructure and facilities.
reviews.review_text: Luxury rooms were available; 1, 2, 3, and 4-seater rooms with CCTV footage. Wi-Fi was also provided with speeds up to 40 Mbps. Mess food is disappointing. Sports activities and a gym are also provided. Medical facilities are available 24/7, and there is a hospital at the main gate.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2027Offered by Chitkara Business School, Chitkara University, ChandigarhReviewed on 9 Dec 2025)
reviews.review_heading: Absolutely satisfied with the hostel, campus and faculty members.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure of the whole university is fabulous. Hostel food is also good they provide and maintain cleanliness. It is also widely appreciated for its modern and well planned infrastructure. SMART classrooms, well stocked libraries, advanced laboratories and innovation and research centres that help student work in competitions. It actually offers a well rounded environment.

reviews.review_heading: Really good facilities for the students in the classrooms as well in the hostels.
reviews.review_text: Every facility for the students is well provided and well maintained in hostels as well as classrooms, a decent quality of food is available in the hostel mess, and a good food court is also available. There are 2 libraries one for the whole college and one specifically for the global students.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2029Offered by Chitkara University Institute of Engineering and Technology, Chitkara University, ChandigarhReviewed on 7 Dec 2025)
reviews.review_heading: Chitkara University has a good environment overall.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure is really good. The buildings and the park are well maintained. Hygiene is maintained overall on the campus. Regular maintenance and cleaning happen. Even the hostels are looked after if students face any issues regarding light or electronics.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2029Offered by Chitkara University Institute of Engineering and Technology, Chitkara University, ChandigarhReviewed on 7 Dec 2025)
reviews.review_heading: I am fully satisfied with my college option.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is of very good quality. All the stuff is in very good condition, and the staff is also very cooperative. The labs are properly furnished and kept neat and clean. The food quality is nice, and it is regularly checked for safety measures for the future.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2029Offered by Chitkara University Institute of Engineering and Technology, Chitkara University, ChandigarhReviewed on 6 Dec 2025)
reviews.review_heading: Offers practical, industry-focused learning with good faculty and strong placements.
reviews.review_text: Both CSE buildings are well maintained, with air-conditioned lecture halls and good seating. Wi-Fi works well. There is also a decent-sized library. Almost every sport is available, with proper equipment and gear. The gym is good overall.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2029Offered by Chitkara University Institute of Engineering and Technology, Chitkara University, ChandigarhReviewed on 6 Dec 2025)
reviews.review_heading: Great exposure and opportunities, but be ready for the discipline.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of the overall campus is really good and provides you with the best services that you pay for. The mess food is still better than a lot, and mostly good. The water is clean, and the hostel has vending machines for your service, even the academic buildings are well built and maintained. They are a bit strict in matters of applying for a gate pass to even step outside the campus, and the hostel rules are made a bit stricter.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2027Offered by Chitkara College of Sales and Marketing, Chitkara University, ChandigarhReviewed on 6 Dec 2025)
reviews.review_heading: Know about my Chitkara University.
reviews.review_text: The hostel is good. Labs are well-maintained, and all facilities are available. From Wi-Fi to food quality is good. Mess is in a good location inside the campus. The library is separate for every building. In the hostel, good furniture and other requirements are provided as needed.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2029Offered by Chitkara University Institute of Engineering and Technology, Chitkara University, ChandigarhReviewed on 5 Dec 2025)
reviews.review_heading: Discover your potential at Chitkara University. Opportunities await you.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi, labs, brilliant classrooms, big libraries with every book on each and every topic taught available. No idea about the hostel, though, as I'm a day scholar, but the sports facilities are to the students' benefit. Overall, the institute offers you the best facilities.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2027Offered by Chitkara College of Sales and Marketing, Chitkara University, ChandigarhReviewed on 2 Dec 2025)
reviews.review_heading: MBA mean Chitkara University.
reviews.review_text: They have very well-maintained infrastructure with separate classrooms and a separate library for every department. They have world 5G Wi-Fi on every floor. They have indoor games on campus along with a big swimming pool available on a rental basis.

paragraphs: Chitkara University grants admissions to students with scholarships offered by the Punjab government and AICTE. To avail of these scholarships, students shall meet the minimum eligibility criteria. These scholarship schemes are introduced to provide financial aid to students belonging to minorities, SC/OBCs, or from Jammu and Kashmir. Chitkara University accepts scholarship students for a lot of its courses.
DFP-Banner

college_info.intro:
Ambedkar University Delhi courses at the Karampura campus are influenced more strongly towards the Humanities subjects. The popular programs at Babasaheb Bhimrao Ambedkar University, Karampura include the large variety of BA courses. These courses are offered in various disciplines like English, Mathematics, History, Sociology, Social Sciences and Humanities, among others.
Also popular among the UG courses are BBA, BVoc, and the Integrated Teacher Education Programs (ITEP). Along with the undergraduate programs, the faculty at AUD Karampura also offers a variety of PG and PhD programs.
More details regarding the popular programs at Ambedkar University Delhi, Karampura are given below:

placements.overview:

The median package recorded for UG 3-year students was INR 3.5 LPA, while for PG 2-year graduates, it was INR 4 LPA.

faqs.answer: Students seeking to enroll into AUD Karampura can choose to avail the accommodation benefit provided by the university. The hostel fees at Ambedkar University Delhi, Karampura is INR 51,000, which includes the one-time security fees of INR 10,000. Students choosing to receive the hostel mess facility would be required to pay an amount of 19,200 per semester (plus INR 1,000 maintenance fee).

faqs.answer: The philosophy of Dr BR Ambedkar University Delhi Karampura has been to provide quality education within an ethical fee structure. The university has employed an elaborate fee-assistance and waiver structure to assist students with financial constraints. The tuition fees depend on the individual courses and the category-wise eligibility of candidates.Regarding hostel fees, students must pay INR 41,000 + INR 10,000 (one-time security) to cover accommodation costs. faqs.question: Q: How costly is Ambedkar University Delhi, Karampura?

faqs.answer: Dr BR Ambedkar University Delhi, Karampura is becoming a prominent name in providing quality education with a responsible focus on humanism and holistic growth. The university offers courses in UG, PG, and PhD programs and provides a variety of exposure events through its freshly set-up Placement Cell.AUD Delhi, Karampura is firmly committed to providing financial assistance to needful students. To this effect, it provides a slab-wise fee-concession structure, as well as complete fee-waivers for SC, ST, and PwD students. Along with these, the students are provided a host of amenities across the 6.5-acre campus and across the various specialised Centers and Schools.

review_summary.college_name: AUD Delhi, Karampura Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: M.A. in Global Studies - Batch of 2021
individual_reviews.title: The first thing I liked about the university is the faculty,

content.Placements: Students become eligible for placements from their 3rd year. Companies like Accenture and Cognizant have visited, and offers made are average of 6-7 LPA and the highest package of this year was 44 LPA. The highest package: is 44 LPA, and the average package is 6-7 LPA. 80% of students got placed in a product-based company, like Flipkart, or Amazon.
content.Infrastructure: The overall experience of my campus life is good. The infrastructure is good with ACs all over the campus which gives great relief in summer. The university should focus more on funding the societies and clubs of the college and also on sports things.

individual_reviews.course: B.A. in Law and Politics - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: From quiet halls to DIY fun.

content.Placements: The placement cell is now being made by the college for our course. Despite making a committee, there are no internships provided by the committee. You can easily get an internship as a paralegal under an advocate while or after completing is degree. You can also work in policy-making and work as a think tank.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of course for law and politics is well-planned and student-friendly. It is a multidisciplinary course and it focuses on both law and politics. The quality of hostel is not that great, in addition to that there are very reserved seats for enrollment in the hostel.

individual_reviews.course: M.A. in Law, Politics and Society - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: Satisfied with college. Course curriculum is good and practical.

content.Placements: Since this is a new course that is being introduced by the BR Ambedkar College. My course name is M.A. in public policy and governance. It is the first batch in this college. There are no placements. But the top roles that are offered in our course are for policy-making decisions and for posts in government offices like Niti Aayog.
content.Infrastructure: Infrastructure at this college is average. They have a playground and canteen. It is quite decent and the rooms are filled are ventilated by AC. But the chair could use some improvements otherwise the infrastructure is good. The food quality in the canteen is hygienic.

individual_reviews.course: B.Voc. in Accounting & Finance - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: If you want to take opportunity of internship I've said above then definitely go for it.

content.Placements: This is a course where you learn the B.Com (Hons) syllabus but in a practical way, which means this college will provide an internship under CAs, which means you should do an internship of 2 months after completion of the 1st year, and it's compulsory. If you don't do it, they can't provide your degree to you at the end of the 3rd year.
content.Infrastructure: There is only hostel facility for girls, so I don't know much, but my friends said that they are good and means easy to survive. And the main thing, the food is good, and the availability of the library, which is I guess the best facility they provide. I can't talk about their Wi-Fi because it has much lower speeds.

individual_reviews.course: B.A. in Law and Politics - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: Journey of Ups and Downs - "College Life"

content.Placements: There is no as such placement cell in our campus but the faculty is very good and we are also taught about Interdisciplinary course. They sometimes offer internship. The students have to find out companies and field from themselves only. The college doesn't provide placement.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of my college is very good with ac's all around the campus which gives relief from scorching heat in the summers. The college also provides Wifi system. The hostel facility is not that good of the college and the university needs to look into this matter as it is a concern.

faqs.question: What is the admission process of Babasaheb Bhimrao Ambedkar University Delhi, Karampura?
faqs.answer: Ambedkar University Delhi admissions at Karampura campus are processed mainly via the entrance-based system. The scoring achieved by the student in the Common University Entrance Test (CUET) is considered for admissions into the various courses and specializations. To begin with, the applicant must visit the official CUET portal and register her/himself for the exam.Upon qualifying the CUET exam, the management at Babasaheb Bhimrao Ambedkar University Delhi, Karampura will screen the candidates based upon merit and category-wise seats. The combination of CUET sections mapped to the particular course at AUD Delhi Karampura would be considered for admissions.

faqs.question: Can I take admission in BR Ambedkar University Delhi, Karampura without CUET exam?
faqs.answer: Admissions for the majority of the UG and PG courses at Babasaheb Bhimrao Ambedkar University Delhi, Karampura are done via the Common University Entrance Test (CUET). The admissions are conducted by considering the scoring achieved in the relevant sections of the CUET exam. Upon registering for the exam, the candidate must specify Dr BR Ambedkar University Delhi as their preference. In many cases, the weightage of different CUET sections is not the same, and appropriate proration is applied.

faqs.question: What are the hostel charges at Ambedkar University Delhi, Karampura?
faqs.answer: Students seeking to enroll into AUD Karampura can choose to avail the accommodation benefit provided by the university. The hostel fees at Ambedkar University Delhi, Karampura is INR 51,000 , which includes the one-time security fees of INR 10,000. Students choosing to receive the hostel mess facility would be required to pay an amount of 19,200 per semester (plus INR 1,000 maintenance fee).

faqs.question: How costly is Ambedkar University Delhi, Karampura?
faqs.answer: The philosophy of Dr BR Ambedkar University Delhi Karampura has been to provide quality education within an ethical fee structure. The university has employed an elaborate fee-assistance and waiver structure to assist students with financial constraints. The tuition fees depend on the individual courses and the category-wise eligibility of candidates. Regarding hostel fees, students must pay INR 41,000 + INR 10,000 (one-time security) to cover accommodation costs. Additionally, students availing the hostel mess facility are required to pay INR 19,200 + INR 1,000 (one-time maintenance fee).

library.description: University has a rich and rapidly growing library located on both campuses, with a fast-growing subscription base of e-journals and resources. The library is fully online and can be accessed both on and off campus.

University has a rich and rapidly growing library located on both campuses, with a fast-growing subscription base of e-journals and resources. The library is fully online and can be accessed both on and off campus.

reviews.review_heading: The first thing I liked about the university is the faculty,
reviews.review_text: The overall experience of my campus life is good. The infrastructure is good with ACs all over the campus which gives great relief in summer. The university should focus more on funding the societies and clubs of the college and also on sports things.

reviews.review_heading: From quiet halls to DIY fun.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of course for law and politics is well-planned and student-friendly. It is a multidisciplinary course and it focuses on both law and politics. The quality of hostel is not that great, in addition to that there are very reserved seats for enrollment in the hostel.

reviews.review_heading: Satisfied with college. Course curriculum is good and practical.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure at this college is average. They have a playground and canteen. It is quite decent and the rooms are filled are ventilated by AC. But the chair could use some improvements otherwise the infrastructure is good. The food quality in the canteen is hygienic.

reviews.review_heading: If you want to take opportunity of internship I've said above then definitely go for it.
reviews.review_text: There is only hostel facility for girls, so I don't know much, but my friends said that they are good and means easy to survive. And the main thing, the food is good, and the availability of the library, which is I guess the best facility they provide. I can't talk about their Wi-Fi because it has much lower speeds.

reviews.review_heading: Journey of Ups and Downs - "College Life"
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of my college is very good with ac's all around the campus which gives relief from scorching heat in the summers. The college also provides Wifi system. The hostel facility is not that good of the college and the university needs to look into this matter as it is a concern.

reviews.review_heading: Ambedkar University has no social life.
reviews.review_text: The college infrastructure is pretty good with smart classes. The college library is also good, but the mess of the college is in very poor condition, and the food is hygienic and very expensive. There are only hostel facilities for girls, and boys have to stay in PGs nearby the college, which are costly if you don't have a roommate to share the burden.

reviews.review_heading: Baba Sahib would have needed therapy after SEE the state of AUD.
reviews.review_text: The only reason why I am giving a rating of 3 is because the college infrastructure is not that bad. In fact, one could say it is good. But the hostel, oh my god, it's ridiculously bad. In my opinion, the college is getting the funds it needs, but the management is not utilizing it well.

reviews.review_heading: Depressing environment and sensitive professors.
reviews.review_text: Until last month, the women's washroom was dirty, and the mirror on the bathroom wall was broken. It has been repaired. The chairs are of good quality, and there is AC in all classrooms and the library, and a cooler in the canteen. The food available in the canteen is limited and depends on the mood of the canteen person (whether to make it or not; no proper menu).

reviews.review_heading: A cooperative faculty and a nice growing institute towards a brighter future.
reviews.review_text: The faculty is quite good, which is one of the major attractions of both the course and the university. The faculty members are very cooperative and available to help students throughout. The infrastructure is also decent in terms of maintenance, classroom facilities, security, etc. I am unaware of the hostel facilities as I live in an individual flat of my own.

reviews.review_heading: Overall, B.R. Ambedkar University in Delhi is good for higher studies as it is a state university.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of the Karampura campus of B.R. Ambedkar University is good. They provide Wi-Fi, a reading room, a library, a lab and sports grounds. The hostel is only for girls where the mess is currently close and the fee is affordable. The campus environment is satisfactory, and the crowd is limited.

reviews.review_heading: Our college provides good infrastructure and helpful teachers but placements are not good.
reviews.review_text: Our college has air-conditioned classrooms, 2 good IT labs, and Wi-Fi. All classrooms have projectors and whiteboards. There is a nice library with a study area. Canteen food is okay, not that good. There is a medical room. Sports like TT, football, and badminton are available. There is a big ground for football with greenery on campus. It is an open environment with a good crowd.

reviews.review_heading: In our college, the admission process is very easy.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi, laboratory, classrooms, and library facilities are good. This is a government university.

reviews.review_heading: A very good faculty, infrastructure, and facilities, and is growing every year.
reviews.review_text: Classrooms, libraries, and labs all have centralized air-conditioners. The maintenance and cleanliness of all the rooms are very good. The sports and other facilities are very good, however, the canteen food is average. The hostel facilities are only for and only if you belong outside NCT.

reviews.review_heading: Good option for students still figuring it out.
reviews.review_text: While there are facilities like computer labs, free Wi-Fi, and a library available. The state of the bathrooms and basic hygiene requirements were not MET. The toilets are unkept with clogged sinks and no cold water for drinking during the summer. Sports however is taken seriously and there are several clubs for the same.

reviews.review_heading: I am satisfied with its course and faculty members.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of this college is basic and minimal like other government colleges. The classrooms are well-furnished with decent benches, a projector, fan, and air-conditioner. Wi-Fi is also available. Computer laboratories are also open for all students to access digital libraries, etc. The library also has a decent amount of books for the courses provided in our college. The hostel of the KP campus has not re-opened yet due to covid.

review_summary.college_name: Rungta College, Bhilai Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Business Administration (BBA) - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: I love my college life, and I also miss my college days.

content.Placements: I got placed in various reputable companies, which are TCS, MRF Limited, Autosense and toit, and I also raised the training and placement cell of our college, which helps us in cracking interviews. The average package was 4.5 LPA, and the highest was 9 LPA. Top recruits are Axis Bank, Deloitte, Google, etc.
content.Infrastructure: Nice and well-equipped classrooms filled with smart features, Wi-Fi labs and a central library. The campus has its own mess for hostelers. Students can play various games.
content.Faculty: All faculty members are very loving and helpful. This course gives us knowledge about management, which makes students industry-ready. Exams have been conducted in the semester. Every semester has 4 subjects, and the pass percentage is 60 to 70%.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Business Administration (BBA) - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: Rungta College of Science and Technology is the best place to pursue your career.

content.Placements: It's not about the percentage number of students please in our college it's about who is capable of getting placement. You should be capable of creating in top MNC companies like Amazon, Google, and Walmart. Almost every student got an internship at our college. Roles like HR manager, sales manager, salesperson, and finance manager are offered.
content.Infrastructure: The college hostel has almost every facility like Wi-Fi, labs, classrooms, libraries, and other food facilities for the students who stay there. The quality of life in our house cell. The quality of food available in the mess and canteen is up to the point and facilities like sports and games are available for the students for their extra activities.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Business Administration (BBA) - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: The kind of community you want to be part of.

content.Placements: The pass percentage of our department students is more than 80% but any single student is not placed through campus selection. But sometimes a few companies recruit a few students at low salary packages for short working periods. Top companies like Amazon, Tata, BSP, etc., visit our college for placements. But the same job offers are offered to students like call center jobs and not any other types of job.
content.Infrastructure: In the mess and hostel, all the items are good except the quality of food they give. Food is not good in taste and is cooked in an improper manner.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Computer Applications (BCA) - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: Information about GD Rungta College of Science and Technology, Bhilai.

content.Placements: Campus placement drives are conducted every year. The placement rate at the engineering department is much higher than in other departments. Overall departments have a good placement rate but engeenering department offers the most. The average salary package ranges from 5 LPA-10 LPA.
content.Infrastructure: Infrastructure is average. The college has various sports sections such as badminton, football, cricket, basketball, and volleyball. The hostel services provide food, cleaning, and laundry services. Overall everything is properly arranged and provided.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Computer Applications (BCA) - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: College environment is nice. Overall, the college is nice.

content.Placements: Around 45% of students were got placements. The highest package was 12 lakh per annum, the average package was 2–3 lakh per annum and the lowest package was 1 lakh per annum. There was a banking company I don't remember; I guess it was Axis Bank. In our college, a smaller number of students get placed. The top role was full-stack development.
content.Infrastructure: The facilities were good but not well maintained. The major problems were that the bathrooms were not maintained and were dirty all the time. I don't think that there are any other problems regarding classes, lab, Wi-Fi, or the library. But one thing is for sure: the software and courses are a bit old, according to today's generation. The hostel's infrastructure was okay but there was a rule that 5 people should live in one room and there was only 1 bathroom for 5 people. Food was the worst. Sports were nicely organized.

review_content.Placements: Around 20% of students were placed in this course. In the management seat, the average salary package offered was 10 LPA, and in merit quota was 3 LPA. But on sunday, all mess was closed, students need to go outside. There were several canteens available. If students don't want hostel, there were rooms available nearby this college.

highlights.summary: The NEET UG 2026 registration window is now closed for admission to the MBBS, BDS, and other courses. The exam is scheduled for May 3, 2026.

faqs.answer: A:    Pandit Raghunath Murmu Medical College And Hospital courses are approved by eminent Government bodies such as NMC. The combined seats available for various programmes provided by Pandit Raghunath Murmu Medical College And Hospital goes up to 125.

reviews_list.review_title: Worth taking admission to this college because of the faculty and infrastructure.

review_content.Placements: MBBS is the top 1% course in all over India. So first you should be grateful that you are getting into a medical college and this college is in top 5 in Odisha state. The PG seats are coming to this college this year and this will make our college more good.
review_content.Infrastructure: In our medical college, there is a separate boys hostel for the first year. There is room accommodation for three students. On every floor, there is a water cooler with a filter built. Corridors and washrooms are cleaned daily by sweepers. Rooms are cleaned by sweepers at regular intervals.

reviews_list.batch_info: MBBS - Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery - Batch of 2026
reviews_list.review_title: Just crack NEET and grab a government medical college.

review_content.Placements: All the students are selected on the basis of an entrance exam, NEET. Here, after the internships, you have to give OPSC to get a government job at any hospital. All the students will do their internships in their 5th year of study. Many more opportunities are available after MBBS.
review_content.Infrastructure: Our course has a big academic building in which specific floors are allotted to different departments. Each department has it’s own classroom, lab, practical room, teachers chamber, demo room etc. Quality of the hostel is also good, specific canteens are available under every hostel for the students to enjoy their meals.

reviews_list.batch_info: MBBS - Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery - Batch of 2027
reviews_list.review_title: Review of Pandit Raghunath Murmu Medical College And Hospital.

review_content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of our college is modern. It is built by L&T builders. Our college provides modern equipment. It has a playground, basketball court, badminton court, administration block where all lecture classes and practicals are done, library, internet room, reading room, etc. Each hostel has a canteen. The quality and quantity of the food offered is very good at affordable rates. Washrooms are clean. All rooms are well-maintained.
review_content.Faculty: MBBS is a vast course. It provides theoretical, practical, and social skills. We have to study well to get ready for the industry. All teachers are doctorates and highly qualified. We have semester exams after every three months. We must pass the final exams to go into the next academic year.

individual_reviews.title: College is nice. Hostel is good. Students are awesome. Faculty members are excellent.

content.Placements: We have nice batch of consistening 125 students. Generally, 125 students are admitted every year. All the students are very supportive. The students do their internships in the government hospital. Many of our students got PG in top colleges like SCB, MKCG, and VIMSAR. Some students also get the opportunity to study in other metropolitan cities and state.
content.Infrastructure: Hostel is very good. We don't need to go through the stars as we have 2 lifts per hostel. It's nice as it saves our time and energy. We have 2 toilets per floor. We have a proper water supply on each floor. There are reading rooms to study in. There are hostel warden and security, so that we can live here without any kind of problems.

individual_reviews.course: MBBS - Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery - Batch of 2029
individual_reviews.title: PRM medical college and hospital provides beautiful campus, top notch education.

content.Placements: 125 students have enrolled in our batch. The MBBS UG course doesn’t provide packages as such, except for applied scholarships. Internship is in government hospitals. Students completing the final year of MBBS get to do internships in government hospitals as doctors.

description: Pandit Raghunath Murmu Medical College And Hospital cutoff 2025 is available on this page for various accepting exams. Candidates can refer to the exam-wise sections below to view the cutoff details across different rounds and categories. Other important updates are as follows:

Pandit Raghunath Murmu Medical College And Hospital NEET UG cutoff 2025 was concluded with the release of the final seat allotment result for admission to the MBBS course. The cutoff was released for several categories belonging to the AI quota. For the General AI quota, the NEET UG last round closing rank was 27293 for MBBS admission. Candidates can refer to the table below to view the first and last round cutoffs 2025 for the General AI category students.

Pandit Raghunath Murmu Medical College And Hospital MBBS cutoff 2025 was 27293 for the students belonging to the General AI quota. Similarly, for the OBC category students, the NEET UG last round closing rank was 21842 for admission to the MBBS course. For other categories and rounds, use the provided filters.

Pandit Raghunath Murmu Medical College And Hospital accepts the NEET UG entrance exam for selecting students to the MBBS course. Candidates with a valid score are then eligible for the NEET UG counselling. For 2026 admission, aspirants must refer to the table below to view some of the important NEET UG 2026 dates to be eligible for admission.

Candidates preparing for admission can refer to the table below to view or download the NEET UG round and year-wise consolidated cutoff list. This will help students to understand the past three years' cutoff trends.

Pandit Raghunath Murmu Medical College And Hospital NEET PG cutoff 2025 has been released for admission to various PG-level courses, like MD. The cutoff was released in the form of opening and closing ranks for multiple categories under the All India quota. For round 4, the closing cutoff for the General AI category ranged from 6517 to 35450. According to this range, the most competitive course is MD. For more details, see the table below.

According to the Pandit Raghunath Murmu Medical College And Hospital MD cutoff 2025, the most sought-after specialisations for the General AI category were MD in General Medicine, followed by MD in Anaesthesiology. The round 4 closing ranks for these specialisations were 6517 and 35450, respectively.

It has a playground, basketball court, badminton court, administration block where all lecture classes and practicals are done, library, internet room, reading room, etc. Each hostel has a canteen. reviews.review_heading: PRM Medical College is the best college in Odisha.
reviews.review_text: Hostels are good. There are 8 water dispensers, including a cold water dispenser. The washrooms are cleaned every day. There is no water problem. There is proper sanitation in our hostel rooms and washrooms.

reviews.review_heading: Our college has good infrastructure and facilities.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our college is good. The campus is full of greenery, and there is a healthy environment. Each classroom has a projector and mic system. The hostel infrastructure is good, and the canteen is attached to it. We have one of the best canteens.

reviews.review_heading: Our college has the best infrastructure and faculty members.
reviews.review_text: This college is situated outside the main city so students can get pure air. It is very crucial for studying and gives mental peace. Different sports facilites like cricket, volleyball, and badminton are available on campus. Smart classrooms, library, and the latest technology-based medical laboratories are available. In the hostel, comfortable rooms, clean washrooms, Wi-Fi, special study rooms, and recreation room are available.

reviews.review_heading: I am satisfied with my decision of choosing this college.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure and hostel facilities are available. Wi-Fi-enabled library, fully equipped labs, and air-conditioned smart classrooms are available on campus.

reviews.review_heading: It is a very good college with good infrastructure.
reviews.review_text: Our college has high-quality Wi-Fi and internet connection. The food quality is very high. Mess is very clean. Staff members are helpful and friendly.

reviews.review_heading: PRM College is the best of all colleges.
reviews.review_text: All the facilities, such as Wi-Fi, labs, classrooms, and library, are good. Hostel food, medical facilities, sports, and games are excellent. You can order food through Zomato and Swiggy.

reviews.review_heading: MBBS is a dream and this college owes to fulfill it.
reviews.review_text: This institute has sufficient facilities for our MBBS career. All the departments have the best teachers, labs, equipment, libraries, computers, models for learning, etc. Our library is good. Hostel rooms are large and well-ventilated. The mess is in the hostel building. Hostel food and life are good at PRM.

reviews.review_heading: I am satisfied with all faculty members.
reviews.review_text: The facilities and infrastructure available for our department are average. Rooms are available for all students of every year. The quality of food available in the mess and canteen, medical facilities, sports, and games are average.

reviews.review_heading: Overall, it is a holistic campus where overall development of your personality is possible.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our college is more than enough for the smooth functioning of all the academic and sports curricula. Labs have adequate equipment. There is an air-conditioned library. Hostel facilities are also good. There is no problem with the facilities required for education.

reviews.review_heading: Except for the accommodation problem, everything in this college is excellent.
reviews.review_text: The overall infrastructure of the college and hostel is good except for the accommodation, especially for girls. The number of rooms and hostels for girls is low. It is hard to accommodate the girls in the limited number of rooms, so they increase the number of girls staying in a room from 3 to 4.

highlights.summary:
The GPAT 2026 application form for admission to the MPharma course is expected to be released during the first week of April 2026.

college_info.intro:
MRSPTU popular programmes are BTech and MBA. BTech and MBA students are placed in top companies at top positions. At the university campus, BTech is available in 6 specialisations, namely Computer Science and Engineering (Artificial Intelligence & Machine Learning), Mechatronics, Biomedical Instrumentation, Biomedical Engineering, Civil Engineering with Computer Application, and Agricultural Engineering). BTech students are trained in modern technology using modern methods of teaching.
MRSPTU MBA students are trained in communication skills, presentation, and managerial skills. Whatever the course, whatever the specialisation, the institutes' main motive is to promote development and research in various fields of technical education. Below mentioned are some of the courses and their respective eligibility and fee:

faqs.answer: A:    In the most recent employment campaign, Maharaja Ranjit Singh Punjab Technical University recorded an average top package of almost 10 LPA.  TCS, Wipro, Infosys, Kotak Mahindra Bank, Max Hospital, OLA Cabs, Spice Labs, Videocon, US Tech Solution, Hitachi Technology, HDFC, and Canvas Craft Media are the leading hiring firms.
faqs.question: Who are the top recruiters of MRSPTU?

faqs.answer: A:    MRSPTU accepts entrance exam scores for admission to BTech and BArch programmes. For all other courses, selection is based on merit of the aspirants in the last qualifying exam. The university considers scores in JEE Main for BTech and NATA for BArch programme. Selected candidates have to participate in counselling rounds for a seat in the university.
faqs.question: What are the entrance exams accepted at MRSPTU?

faqs.answer: A:    According to the MRSPTU the eligibility criteria for MBA is • The latest cutoff Passed graduation or equivalent in any stream with at least 50% marks and 45% for SC/ST candidates.• Have a bachelor's degree of minimum 3 years duration from UGC/AICTE recognised institutions.• Have obtained at least 50% (45% in case of candidate belonging to reserved category) at the qualifying examination.•Have minimum 1 year work experience is required in any government or private limited company .The cutoff depends on the entrance exams like JEE Main, NATA, GATE, CMAT, etc.I hope you got your answer.Thankyou
faqs.question: What is the latest cutoff information for MBA at MRSPTU?

faqs.answer: A:    Candidates who have passed BCA/ BSc (Computer Science)/ BSc IT/ BE (CSe)/ BE (IT) or equivalent or passed any graduation degree preferably with Mathematics at Class 12 or graduation level with at least 50% aggregate (45% aggregate for candidates belonging to reserved category) can apply for MCA programme.
faqs.question: What is the eligibility for MCA at MRSPTU?

faqs.answer: A:    The Maharaja Ranjit Singh Punjab Technical University (MRSPTU) in Bathinda, India, requires a minimum of 50% marks in aggregate from a recognised university for admission to MBA programs. For reserved categories, the minimum is 45%.  The MRSPTU's cutoff marks vary depending on the course, category, and round of counseling
faqs.question: What is the minimum cutoff for MBA at MRSPTU 2023?

individual_reviews.title: Placement is decent here. So, it could be improved.

content.Placements: In the session of 2024-25, there are 75% students got placements in CSE in startup and non-technical companies. The highest package in this session 2025 was 12 LPA, and the lowest package was 3 LPA. If we come to average, it is around 4.5 LPA. 60% of students got internship opportunity offered by startup companies. Roles offered are system analyst, full-stack developer, and senior testing engineer.
content.Infrastructure: College building and its infrastructure are designed in the style of old palace which looks very authentic. Lawn is very good. Hostels are available both in AC and non-AC for students. Campus has fully Wi-Fi covered facility. Food and mess are very good. There is also a dispensary for students to give them first aid and immediate response to curve students. There are hockey court, a huge cricket ground, basketball court, volleyball court, kabaddi court, and badminton court. Indoor stadium is also available. Labs are well-equipped with modern computers, machines, and tools.

admission_overview.college_name: MRSPTU Admission 2025: Courses, Eligibility, Dates & Application Process

admission_overview.title: MRSPTU Admission Overview 2025
admission_overview.description: Maharaja Ranjit Singh Punjab Technical University or MRSPTU admission 2025 is both merit and entrance-based. The university accepts national-level entrance exams such as JEE Main, GATE, NATA, etc. for admission to specific courses. The students are required to register themselves for the courses first. MRSPTU offers a plethora of courses through its main campus as well as constituent and affiliated colleges in various streams of Science, Technology, Engineering, Commerce and Management and more.

eligibility_selection.title: MRSPTU Eligibility & Selection 2025
eligibility_selection.description: At the UG level, the university offers courses such as BPharma, BTech, BSc, BArch, BSc, BBA, BCA, BSc, BMS, and more. Whereas at the PG level, MRSPTU courses include MCom, MBA, MCA, MSc, MTech, MPharma and M.Arch. Maharaja Ranjit Singh Punjab Technical University application process is conducted in an online mode. The eligibility criteria and selection process of the courses offered by the university vary from one to another. Apart from UG and PG courses, the university offers PG diploma and skill-based courses. Below are popular MRSPTU courses along with their eligibility and selection criteria: Course

courses_table.eligibility: Passed Class 12 from a recognised board with Physics and Chemistry as compulsory subject and Mathematics or Biology as one of the subjects

Passed Class 12 from a recognised board with Physics and Mathematics as compulsory subjects and Chemistry / Biotechnology / Computer Science / Biology / Technical Vocational Subject as one of the subjects
Passed Class 12 from a recognised board in subjects pertaining to that of specialisation of the course with a minimum aggregate as per the course specialisations
BSc or equivalent UG degree from a UGC recognised university with a subject similar to that of specialisation with a minimum aggregate of 50% (45% marks for SC/ST students)

Passed Class 12 from a recognised board with minimum 50% marks in Physics, Chemistry & Mathematics, individually and an aggregate of 50% or passed diploma with Mathematics as a compulsory subject with a minimum aggregate of 50%
BE, BTech, MSc with specialisation in respective branch from a UGC recognised University with a minimum aggregate of 50% marks (45% marks in case of SC/ST category
BPharma or equivalent UG degree from UGC recognised university with a minimum aggregate of 55% (50% in case of SC/ST)

faqs.answer: Yes, MRSPTU offers Executive MBA for three-years at the PG level. Candidates who have complete a bachelor's degree of a minimum of three-years with at least 50% aggregate can apply for the Executive MBA programme. There is a relaxation of 5% in the aggregate for candidates belonging to reserved category. Besides, a minimum of one-year of work experience is required in any government or private limited company.
faqs.question: Is Executive MBA available at MRSPTU?

faqs.answer: No, candidates do not require passing an entrance exam for admission to MPharm programme at MRSPTU. The selection to this course is based on merit of the aspirants in the last qualifying exam. Aspirants should pass BPharm degree examination of an Indian University with at least 50% aggregate to get admission in the MPharm programme.
faqs.question: Is entrance exam required for MPharm at MRSPTU?

faqs.answer: Candidates who have passed BCA/ BSc (Computer Science)/ BSc IT/ BE (CSe)/ BE (IT) or equivalent or passed any graduation degree preferably with Mathematics at Class 12 or graduation level with at least 50% aggregate (45% aggregate for candidates belonging to reserved category) can apply for MCA programme.
faqs.question: What is the eligibility for MCA at MRSPTU?

paragraphs: MRSPTU admission processincludes multiple steps such as registration, selection and counselling. Aspirants must first apply for the course of their choice to participate in the selection rounds. Below are the steps to get a seat in MRSPTU:
STEP 1: MRSPTU Application Process 2025
Candidates wishing to apply for a course must fill out the application form on the university website. Aspirants need to pay an application fee to register for a course.
STEP 2: Selection
MRSPTU selects candidates for BTech and BArch based on entrance exam score. For all other courses, the marks of the candidates in the last qualifying exam is considered.
STEP 3: Merit List & Counselling

MRSPTU releases a merit list based on entrance exam score or merit in the last qualifying exam. Selected candidates are called for online counselling. Aspirants must provide the specified documents for verification at the time of admission. Shortlisted aspirants must payMRSPTU feeto confirm their seat in the university.

The total fee of MRSPTU is a sum of multiple components such as tuition fee, development fund, student fund, security deposit, etc. Some of the fee components are paid semester-wise. Below is MRSPTU fee and average package for popular courses:
Note:This information is sourced from official website/ sanctioning body and is subject to change.
The seat intake for MRSPTU varies course-wise. The reservation of seats is as per Punjab Government, Department of Technical Education and Industrial Training. Below is course-wise intake for MRSPTU:

faqs.question: When is MRSPTU application forms out?
faqs.answer: The Maharaja Ranjit Singh Punjab Technical University 2023 Application Form for Various Courses was released on January 30,  2023.In 2015, Maharaja Ranjit Singh Punjab Technical University (MRSPTU) was established. The university offers B.Tech, B.Arch, BBA, B.Sc, BCA, B.Com, and B.Pharm programs at the undergraduate level, as well as M.Tech, M.Arch, M.Pharm, M.Sc, and MBA programs at the graduate level.Furthermore, it offers Ph.D. degree programs in a variety of engineering and technology, science, and pharmacy fields, as well as Lateral Entry programs. You may find information about MRSPTU Admission 2023 below, such as the Application Form, Fees, Exam Dates, Eligibility Criteria, and How to Apply.

placement_data.title: MRSPTU Placements 2023
paragraphs: According to Maharaja Ranjit Singh Punjab Technical University NIRF report 2023, 149 UG and 27 PG students were placed during MRSPTU placements 2022. The median package offered to UG (4-year) and UG (5-year) students stood at INR 4 LPA and INR 3.5 LPA, respectively. For PG (2-year) courses, the median package offered during Maharaja Ranjit Singh Punjab Technical University placements 2022 was INR 3 LPA .

data: Maharaja Ranjit Singh Punjab Technical University Placements 2022: The median package offered to UG (4-year) students during 2022 placements dropped by nearly 11% when compared with 2021 The median package offered to PG (2-year) students during 2022 placements dropped by nearly 19% when compared with 2021

faqs.question: What was the highest package offered at MRSPTU?
faqs.answer: The maximum pay package available is 8 LPA. The lowest wage package available is two LPA. The average compensation package is three LPA. In the most recent employment campaign, Maharaja Ranjit Singh Punjab Technical University recorded an average top package of almost 10 LPA. TCS, Wipro, Infosys, Kotak Mahindra Bank, Max Hospital, OLA Cabs, Spice Labs, Videocon, US Tech Solution, Hitachi Technology, HDFC, and Canvas Craft Media are the leading hiring firms.

highlights.summary: The HSTES 2026 counselling registration process for Guru Gobind Singh College of Pharmacy, Guru Nanak Khalsa Group of Educational Institutions admission to the BTech course is expected to begin in June 2026.

placements.overview: Guru Gobind Singh College of Pharmacy, Guru Nanak Khalsa Group of Educational Institutions, is located in Yamuna Nagar, Haryana. It is an institute approved by PCI and AICTE. Guru Gobind Singh College of Pharmacy, Guru Nanak Khalsa Group of Educational Institutions provides 8 UG, PG and Certificate courses in 3 specialisations, namely Emergency Medical Technology, Pharmaceutical and Sales & Marketing. Theses programmes are offered in Full Time mode. B.Pharma, M.Pharma, D.Pharma and Certificate are some of the courses offered at Guru Gobind Singh College of Pharmacy, Guru Nanak Khalsa Group of Educational Institutions. Some of the streams in which these courses are offered include Medicine & Health Sciences and Business & Management Studies. The total fee at Guru Gobind Singh College of Pharmacy, Guru Nanak Khalsa Group of Educational Institutions ranges between INR 15,000 to 25,00,000. Guru Gobind Singh College of Pharmacy, Guru Nanak Khalsa Group of Educational Institutions has a student intake of for all the courses. Guru Gobind Singh College of Pharmacy, Guru Nanak Khalsa Group of Educational Institutions offers all the infrastructural facilities to students.

reviews_list.batch_info: Bachelor of Pharmacy (B.Pharma.) - Batch of 2027
reviews_list.review_title: Really good infrastructure and faculty members.

review_content.Placements: About 95% of students were placed in my course. The highest package is about 12-15 LPA exactly not known. Top companies are Cipla, Sun Pharma, etc. About 90% of students got internships in many pharmacy companies and hospitals in Himachal, Punjab, Haryana, etc.
review_content.Infrastructure: Welcome our college is well developed and the infrastructure is very good. Classrooms, libraries, and labs are well-developed and good. There are good Wi-Fi connections. The hostel food is good and they provide medical facilities also. There is a snooker pool, table tennis, and volleyball in the hostel and also on college campus.

reviews_list.batch_info: Bachelor of Pharmacy (B.Pharma.) - Batch of 2027
reviews_list.review_title: Fully satisfied because of faculty members.

review_content.Placements: Around 75% of students from our college secure placements. The starting salary packages range from a minimum of Rs. 8,000 to a maximum of Rs. 25,000. Students also secure internship opportunities in companies like Sun Pharma and Novo Nordisk. Some students pursue higher studies such as M.Pharm, while others start their own businesses as pharmacists.
review_content.Infrastructure: College provide us many facilities like Wi-Fi, a computer lab, and a library. There are separate rooms such as girls' room and a boys' common room. In every room air conditioning is installed. College has a good ventilation system.

reviews_list.batch_info: Bachelor of Pharmacy (B.Pharma.) - Batch of 2026
reviews_list.review_title: There are good facilities available.

review_content.Placements: Placements are good at this college. Almost 70% of students are selected for placement and they are placed. The highest package at this college is 5 lacs per year. The college placement cell is so good and students get into reputed companies or industries.
review_content.Infrastructure: Hostel facilities are good and the warden is a good teacher. In the hostel, every facility is available and all types of sports are available. The food quality is poor. But the menu is the best and the hostel has so many good rooms and facilities.

reviews_list.batch_info: Bachelor of Pharmacy (B.Pharma.) - Batch of 2024
reviews_list.review_title: May be satisfied. But not fully .

review_content.Placements: Maximum students look for further studies after B.Pharma. And those who are interested in jobs college have collaboration with many companies. And as a fresher you can get a job of 18500 per month in these companies the amount may vary as per the ability of the candidate.
review_content.Infrastructure: In 2020 the facilities where not that much good as compared to now. They renovated the infrastructure and added more facilities like increase in number of books in library and good canteen food. Sports facilities. Now a days college has been indulge in promoting students talent as well.

content.Infrastructure: The classrooms are big enough and have fresh air always. There are clean corridors and classrooms. The library has all the essential books related to our subjects and also many other reference books. There is a good mess for students.

individual_reviews.course: Ayurvedacharya in Ayurvedic Medicine and Surgery - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: The management does not provide enough facilities.

content.Placements: The placement is good, I don't have that much idea about the placement. The package offered depends on the grades of the student. As in these courses, the internship is most important and everyone has to get a chance to do an internship, there is no certainty.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure is good and well developed, but compared to that, the hostel is not that good, there is a lack of facilities in the hostel. In college infrastructure classrooms are good, and practical labs and workshops are also good, but there are no facilities for sports or any games.
