fees_and_eligibility.overview: At the UG and PG levels, Sitapur Shiksha Sansthan Group of Institutions offers a diverse range of progammes. Candidates can choose Full Time courses, from streams like Engineering, Medicine & Health Sciences and Business & Management Studies. College offers B.E. / B.Tech, BCA and B.Pharma courses at the UG level. While, at the PG level, the college offers available programmes like MBA/PGDM. The Sitapur Shiksha Sansthan Group of Institutions course fee ranges between INR 1,00,200 to 2,82,000.

reviews_list.review_title: Lightly dissatisfied because of area.

review_content.Placements: There are many students in my course or branch all are from different cities like Varanasi, mathura, Agra. Many companies visited at the time of placement. Mostly local companies. Many courses offered in B.tech like computer science, mechanical, electronics, electrical.
review_content.Infrastructure: Many facilities provided by the college like labs, library and give preferences to extra curricular activities. You have more than enough time to prepare for further studies. Hostel is very big and good. Every room consists of 2 or 3 students. Mess food is average.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2020
reviews_list.review_title: Absolutely satisfied because of faculty, good placements in 2017, and really good infrastructure.

review_content.Placements: Our course was the easiest and loved by many. So, more than 30% of students were placed in our course. The packages offered were reasonable. Many top recruiting companies came for our course. 50% of students got internships from MNCs. The roles offered were good.
review_content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure is average. If you are joining the hostel for the first time, then you will struggle for some days. But my experience was good. The best quality food is provided. Medical facilities are available. If you don't like the food, then you can eat in the canteen. Sports facilities are available for the good health and fitness of students.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2019
reviews_list.review_title: Our college has good Infrastructure and faculty members.

review_content.Placements: Some companies visited here for placements and some students got placements in reputed companies. It is the best college for all courses.
review_content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of the college is so good it has a lot of space. The college had all the facilities for students like a library in all the buildings, a play area, and a canteen. There was a huge hall and two computer labs. It also has medical facilities and a hostel for students and quarters for teachers.
review_content.Faculty: All the faculty members of the college are good, helpful, and friendly. The college has a friendly atmosphere. Semesters examinations are held, and we also have sessional exams for internal marking conducted in a very proper way. All the teachers are well educated from reputed universities. The education system here is good.

description: Sitapur Shiksha Sansthan Group of Institutions cutoff 2025 has been announced for admission to BTech programme for all categories and rounds in the both the All India and Home State quota. Students can scroll to the exam-wise sections below for details about Sitapur Shiksha Sansthan Group of Institutions UPTAC Cutoff 2025 and other exams. A few more exam-related updates are in the pointers below:

The Sitapur Shiksha Sansthan Group of Institutions cutoff 2024 was concluded for JEE Main with the release of the final cutoff list. The cutoff was released as the opening and closing ranks for admission to the BE/BTech, courses. During the Sitapur Shiksha Sansthan Group of Institutions BE/BTech cutoff 2024, the last-round closing ranks ranged between 402480 and 1256526 for the General AI category students. Of all the BE/BTech specialisations, the one that faced fierce competition was B.Tech. in

The JEE Main cutoff 2024 was released for the General, OBC, ST, SC, EWS, and PWD categories in the AI quota. Considering the last round 2024 cutoff, B.Tech. in Electronics and Communication Engineering was the most sought-after BE/BTech specialization with a closing rank of 402480 for the general AI quota. The closing cutoff for the same stood at 562089 in 2023.

Sitapur Shiksha Sansthan Group of Institutions accepts JEE Main scores, followed by JoSAA and CSAB counselling rounds for admission to BTech and Integrated BTech courses. Candidates seeking admission to Sitapur Shiksha Sansthan Group of Institutions can refer to the table below for tentative JEE Main schedule.

Sitapur Shiksha Sansthan Group of Institutions JEE Main cutoff 2024 is now over for BTech, Integrated BTech, and BArch courses. For JEE Main, a total of five counselling rounds were conducted. Additionally, two CSAB counselling rounds were also conducted to fill the vacant seats. reviews_list.batch_info: BDS - Bachelor of Dental Surgery - Batch of 2024
reviews_list.review_title: The college is good, food is average, more girls 30:1.

review_content.Placements: There were 40 students in my batch, the lowest tuition fee was 86,000 per year, but the highest was 4 lakhs per year. The internship in BDS is a compulsory rotary internship in our own college, after which we have to search for jobs ourselves. There are no placements in BDS.
review_content.Infrastructure: The food was not bad compared to other hostels, but the cost was a lot. First year, it was only 45k per year, then it became 60k the next year, 78k, and now it is 94k per year. They say it's because "raw materials are higher." The hostels were a sharing system, usually 2-3 in a room. It was comparatively good. There is a library, labs are good, classrooms are good too, and we have one month every year dedicated to sports, which is good.

faqs.question: What is the eligibility for MDS at Coorg Institute of Dental Sciences?
faqs.answer: Aspirants who have completed a Undergraduate Dental education in India can apply for Coorg Institute of Dental Sciences MDS programme. Candidates must also complete Compulsory Rotatory Internship by March 31 of current year.Candidates should also have obtained permanent registration with the Dental Council of India or any of the State Dental Council or should obtain the same within one month from the date of admission.

courses_data.name: CIDS Coorg BDS Admission 2025
courses_data.description: Coorg Institute of Dental Sciencesoffers aBDScourse of 5 years in full time mode. Admission to BDS programme at Coorg Institute of Dental Sciences is merit-based. Candidates who meets the eligibility criteria can apply directly on the college’s official website. There are a total of40seats available for this programme.

faqs.question: Is there any age limit to apply for BDS at Coorg Institute of Dental Sciences?
faqs.answer: Yes, Coorg Institute of Dental Sciences has defined the age limit to apply for BDS programme. Aspirants must have completed 17 Years of age at the time of admission or shall complete this age as on the Dec 31 of the admission year. Besides, he or she must also be medically fit to undergo the course and practice dentistry.

faqs.question: What is the qualification required to apply for BDS at Coorg Institute of Dental Sciences?
faqs.answer: Aspirants must have passed Karnataka PUC II examination or equivalent with Physics,Chemistryand Biology as optional subjects and English as one of the languages with at least 50% aggregate (40% aggregate for SC/ ST) in three subjects to apply for BDS course at Coorg Institute of Dental Sciences. Aspirants must hold the documents proving their eligibility for verification at the time of admission.

faqs.question: What is the seat intake for BDS at Coorg Institute of Dental Sciences?
faqs.answer: Coorg Institute of Dental Sciences has a total intake of 40 for BDS course. Candidates are offered seat in the programme based on their NEET score. Aspirants once selected need to participate in KEA Counselling for seat allotment. Aspirants need to report at the campus of CIDS for seat confirmation and fee payment.

faqs.question: Can I apply at Coorg Institute of Dental Sciences with 65% in Class 12?
faqs.answer: Candidates need to pass a minimum of Class 12 to apply for BDS programme at Coorg Institute of Dental Sciences. The minimum aggregate required in Class 12 is 50%. Hence, aspirants with 65% aggregate in Class 12 can apply for BDS programme. There is a relaxation of 5% in aggregate for SC/ ST category.

faqs.question: Can I get admission at Coorg Institute of Dental Sciences without entrance exam?
faqs.answer: No, candidates cannot get admission at Coorg Institute of Dental Sciences without entrance exam score. The institute considers scores in NEET for BDS admission. Aspirants with a valid score in NEET MDS can get admission in the MDS programme. Once selected, aspirants need to apply for KEA Counselling for seat allotment.

faqs.question: How can I get admission at Coorg Institute of Dental Sciences?
faqs.answer: Coorg Institute of Dental Sciences admissions are entrance-based. Candidates must appear for NEET for admission to BDS programme. For MDS, the selection is based on NEET MDS score of the candidate. Besides, aspirants must score equal or above the CIDS Coorg cutoff to get a seat in the institute. Candidates need to participate in KEA Counselling to get a seat in CIDS.

faqs.question: Can I get direct admission at Coorg Institute of Dental Sciences?
faqs.answer: No, Coorg Institute of Dental Science does not offer direct admission. The institute considers NEET and NEET MDS scores for admission to BDS and MDS programmes, respectively. Aspirants first need to apply for the accepted entrance exam and then appear for the same. Aspirants with a score equal or above CIDS cutoff are further required to participate in state-level counselling.

review_content.Placements: Being a doctor is considered to be of very high esteem in our country. There isn't any placement or such in medical colleges, but rest assured when we pass out with a medical degree from such a reputable college there will be no shortage of jobs. One dentist can easily earn up to Rs. 50,000 per month according to their ability.
review_content.Infrastructure: HIDS has its own dedicated library with a vast collection of medical books. All reference books, medical journals, guidebooks, and much more are available for students starting from 1st year to MS. All the non-clinical subjects have their own assigned laboratories with enough infrastructure. Clinics contain all the modern equipment required for a dental hospital. All lecture halls are air-conditioned with modern projectors and under constant CCTV surveillance. Boys' and girls hostels are different, with 3 different canteens, 1 general shop, and one unisex parlor inside the campus. Maximum requirements of students are fulfilled inside the campus itself. Different playgrounds for football, basketball, volleyball, and tennis are available for the athletes. The food in mess is okay.

reviews_list.review_title: Absolutely satisfied with the faculty, nice curriculum and good infrastructure.

review_content.Placements: As BDS is all about getting a medical degree, you can start earning once you complete your internship and gain proper knowledge. It's a professional course, so you can earn as much as you can and can also apply for jobs in hospitals or else work as a junior doctor under a senior doctor. College does not provide any placement.
review_content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of the college is moderate, but faculty members present here are excellent. The college also has hostel facilities, and I would say they are manageable, not so lavish, but as a student, you can manage it. There are 2 mess and 5 canteens inside the campus, and the food is average.

reviews_list.batch_info: BDS - Bachelor of Dental Surgery - Batch of 2022
reviews_list.review_title: Himachal Institute of Dental Sciences is a dentistry hub.

review_content.Placements: Placements depend on how you have been training yourself though many students clear the PG exams and are capable of opening clinics after UG as well as PG. But imterns and residents here do not get any stipend this is the drawback. The campus is huge.
review_content.Infrastructure: The hostel is good with the availability of 2 and 3 seater rooms in our college. They have wall fans in the classes. The lecture theatres have air-conditioners. There is the staired design of seat for focus on every student. The library is well furnished and it is the most desired place of students. It has all the books.

review_summary.college_name: Himachal Institute of Dental Sciences Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: BDS - Bachelor of Dental Surgery - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: A good option for one seeking admission for a BDS degree.

content.Placements: Being a doctor is considered to be of very high esteem in our country. There isn't any placement or such in medical colleges, but rest assured when we pass out with a medical degree from such a reputable college there will be no shortage of jobs. One dentist can easily earn up to Rs. 50,000 per month according to their ability.
content.Infrastructure: HIDS has its own dedicated library with a vast collection of medical books. All reference books, medical journals, guidebooks, and much more are available for students starting from 1st year to MS. All the non-clinical subjects have their own assigned laboratories with enough infrastructure. Clinics contain all the modern equipment required for a dental hospital. All lecture halls are air-conditioned with modern projectors and under constant CCTV surveillance. Boys' and girls hostels are different, with 3 different canteens, 1 general shop, and one unisex parlor inside the campus. Maximum requirements of students are fulfilled inside the campus itself. Different playgrounds for football, basketball, volleyball, and tennis are available for the athletes. The food in mess is okay.

description: Himachal Institute of Dental Sciences cutoff 2025 is available on this page for various accepting exams. Candidates can refer to the exam-wise sections below to view the cutoff details across different rounds and categories. Other important updates are as follows:

Himachal Institute of Dental Sciences NEET UG cutoff 2024 has been announced for admission to the BDS course. The institute offers admission to the BDS - Bachelor of Dental Surgery course based on candidates’ performance in the NEET UG exam. Eligible candidates are then called for the counselling rounds for final admission. During the Himachal Institute of Dental Sciences 2024 cut off, the last round closing rank for BDS admission was 3225. For more information, refer to the table below:
As per the Himachal Institute of Dental Sciences BDS cutoff 2024, the last round closing rank was 3225 for the General AI category students.

Among the OBC category students, the last-round cutoff rank stood at 3393 for admission to BDS in the AI quota. For the students belonging to the SC category, the cutoff closed at 3376 in the final round. To learn more about the courses, rounds, and category-wise NEET UG cutoff trends, use the filters provided below:

Himachal Institute of Dental Sciences accepts NEET UG scores for admission to the BDS course. Candidates can refer to the table below to check out the important NEET UG dates for admission to Himachal Institute of Dental Sciences.

Himachal Institute of Dental Sciences NEET UG Counselling 2024 has been concluded for admission to the Medical courses for various categories such as General, OBC, SC, and ST. Candidates seeking admission to Himachal Institute of Dental Sciences can refer to the table below to view or download the consolidated year-wise NEET UG counselling rounds.

In the table below, candidates can view the last three years' cutoff details of the courses offered via NEET UG. In the last round, Himachal Institute of Dental Sciences BDS cutoff 2025 was 2638 for the General Home State category.

In 2024, the last round cutoff rank for the same course stood at 809715. So, considering the last two years' cutoff data, it is evident that the HP NEET UG cutoff has increasing for BDS admission over the past three years.

Himachal Institute of Dental Sciences Cutoff 2024 has been released for its first round based on candidates' performance in the HP NEET PG exam. The Round 1 cutoff for admission to the MDS in Conservative Dentistry was 73 for the General AI quota.

Candidates can find the Round 1 Cutoff for this year along with the last-round cutoff for the previous 2 years to have an overall idea of the Cutoff trends. However, more details such as round and category-wise cutoff can be viewed using the filter pro
